description: Library of compensating controls for SOD violations

cost_disclaimer.note: All cost estimates are APPROXIMATE and vary by organization size, existing infrastructure, and implementation approach
what_costs_include: Staff time for reviews and approvals (opportunity cost)
what_costs_exclude: One-time implementation costs (shown separately as implementation_hours)
cost_disclaimer.typical_variance: Actual costs may range from 50% to 200% of estimates depending on organizational factors

segregated_workflows.name: Segregated Approval Workflows
segregated_workflows.description: System automatically routes transactions for approval by a different user than the creator

implementation.configuration: IF transaction.creator = current_approver THEN route_to = manager ELSE allow_approval
implementation.technical_details: NetSuite workflow customization with conditional approval routing based on creator field

audit_trail.log_details: Transaction ID, Creator, Original Approver, Routed Approver, Routing Reason, Timestamp

dual_approval_workflow.name: Dual Approval Workflow
dual_approval_workflow.description: All transactions above specified threshold require approval from two different authorized individuals

implementation.configuration: IF transaction.amount > threshold THEN require_approvals = 2 AND approver1 != approver2

audit_trail.log_details: Transaction ID, Amount, Approver 1, Approver 2, Approval Timestamps, Comments

transaction_limits.name: Transaction Amount Limits
transaction_limits.description: System-enforced maximum transaction amounts per user or role

audit_trail.log_details: Transaction ID, Amount, Limit, User, Timestamp, Approval if exceeded

real_time_monitoring.name: Real-Time Transaction Monitoring
real_time_monitoring.description: Automated system monitors transactions in real-time and generates alerts for suspicious patterns

alert_triggers: Same user creates and approves transaction
Transaction amount exceeds normal pattern (>2x average)
Multiple transactions to same vendor in short timeframe
Transactions to vendors not in approved vendor list

audit_trail.log_details: Alert ID, Trigger Rule, Transaction Details, User, Timestamp, Alert Recipients, Response Actions

manager_approval.name: Manager Pre-Approval
manager_approval.description: Direct manager must approve access request or transaction before processing

implementation.process: Request → Manager Review → Manager Approval → Implementation

audit_trail.log_details: Request ID, Requestor, Manager, Approval Decision, Justification, Timestamp

manager_review.name: Periodic Manager Review
manager_review.description: Direct manager conducts periodic review of all high-risk transactions

audit_trail.log_details: Review Period, Manager, Transactions Reviewed, Findings, Exceptions, Sign-off Date

increased_audit_frequency.name: Increased Audit Review Frequency
increased_audit_frequency.description: Internal audit conducts more frequent reviews of transactions with SOD conflicts

implementation.frequency: Monthly or Quarterly based on risk
implementation.scope: All transactions created and processed by users with SOD conflicts

audit_trail.log_details: Audit Period, Auditor, Sample Size, Findings, Exceptions, Recommendations, Management Response

quarterly_audit_review.name: Quarterly Audit Committee Review
quarterly_audit_review.description: Audit committee reviews all SOD exceptions and compensating controls quarterly

implementation.deliverable: Audit committee minutes documenting review and approval

audit_trail.log_details: Meeting Date, Attendees, SOD Exceptions Reviewed, Decisions, Action Items

ceo_approval.name: CEO/CFO Executive Approval
ceo_approval.description: Executive-level approval required for high-risk access combinations

implementation.process: Request → Manager → CFO/CEO → Risk Committee → Implementation

audit_trail.log_details: Request ID, Requestor, Executive Approver, Justification, Decision, Conditions, Timestamp

separate_accounts.name: Separate User Accounts by Function
separate_accounts.description: User has separate accounts for different functions (e.g., admin account vs. operational account)

audit_trail.log_details: User ID, Account Purpose, Active Sessions, Login History

separate_accounts.limitations: May not be practical for all users; primarily for IT administrators

change_management.name: Formal Change Management Process
change_management.description: All system changes follow formal change management with approvals and testing

implementation.process: Request → Impact Analysis → Approval → Testing → Implementation → Review

audit_trail.log_details: Change ID, Description, Requestor, Approver, Testing Results, Implementation Date, Rollback Plan

peer_review.name: Mandatory Peer Code Review
peer_review.description: All code changes and configurations reviewed by peer before deployment

audit_trail.log_details: Change ID, Author, Reviewer, Review Comments, Approval Timestamp

low_risk_package.name: Low Risk Control Package
low_risk_package.description: Minimal controls for low-risk SOD violations

medium_risk_package.name: Medium Risk Control Package (Standard)
medium_risk_package.description: Standard controls for medium-risk SOD violations - Practical for mid-sized organizations
medium_risk_package.estimated_annual_cost_note: ESTIMATE ONLY - Typical range: $10K-25K. Primarily manager review time and audit costs. Minimal tooling required.

high_risk_package.name: High Risk Control Package
high_risk_package.description: Comprehensive controls for high-risk SOD violations

critical_risk_package.name: Critical Risk Control Package (Enterprise-Grade)
critical_risk_package.description: Maximum controls for critical SOD violations - Full SOX-compliant control environment
critical_risk_package.estimated_annual_cost_note: ESTIMATE ONLY - Typical range: $50K-150K depending on transaction volume, existing tools, and organizational size. Includes monitoring tools, manager review time, audit costs, and board oversight.

executive_access_package.name: Executive Access Control Package
executive_access_package.description: Special controls for executive-level access (Controller, CFO, etc.)

additional_requirements.approval_level: Board of Directors or Audit Committee
additional_requirements.documentation: Full business justification and risk acceptance form required

developer_access_package.name: Developer/IT Access Control Package
developer_access_package.description: Special controls for IT/developer access to production systems

additional_requirements.production_access_restrictions: Emergency use only with documented justification

effectiveness_calculations.risk_reduction_formula: Residual Risk = Inherent Risk * (1 - Total Risk Reduction %)
effectiveness_calculations.total_risk_reduction: Sum of individual control risk reductions (capped at 95%)
